programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: (MA) Kristin and her brother only had each other in foster care, but he grew into a violent criminal. After his brutal murders, she struggles to understand who her brother truly is.

programme.title: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: A Killer Among Friends
programme.desc: (M) Best friends take a girl's trip to Vegas before grad school, but only one returns home. As the stakes rise, sharing long-hidden secrets may be the only chance at finding justice.

programme.title: Undercover Underage
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
